# Buzztm

> Buzztm combines signal testing, UGC production, landing adaptation, and bilingual rollout into a tighter operator stack for brands that need revenue-facing TikTok work.

Main site: https://www.buzztm.com/
Sitemap: https://www.buzztm.com/sitemap.xml
Canonical contact page: https://www.buzztm.com/contact/?lang=en
Extended AI-readable brief: https://www.buzztm.com/llms-full.txt
